basics.name: Julius Lagazo
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.S. in Computer Engineering in the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering at the University of Hawaii. I expect to graduate in Spring, 2026. My goal is to stay rooted and give back to the community that raised me. ALOHA!

education.area: Electrical & Computer Engineering: CENG Track (expected Spring, 2026)

awards.title: Career and Technical Education (CTE) Certification
awards.summary: An educational program that aligns academic standards with technical knowledge and skills to prepare students for careers in current or emerging occupations and further education; completed with a final Performance Based Assessment (PBA) project.

awards.title: C.A.N.O.E Hawai'i Pre-Health Academy Certification
awards.awarder: Lark Morin, Pacific Area Health Education Center (AHEC)
awards.summary: An introductional program that sets the foundation for students interested in pursuing a career in the health field; involves a series of workshops exhibiting clinical skills, soft and hard skill development, and career exploration.
